nodes.label: OTA Firmware Architecture
nodes.rationale: Defines the full OTA update architecture for STM32L476RG: hardware constraints, FRAM layout, bootloader design, state machine, protocol, and phased roadmap. Design principles: fail-safe first, atomic commit, minimal RAM, separation of concerns, idempotent operations, device-initiated only.

nodes.label: OTA Implementation Status
nodes.rationale: Tracks phase-by-phase completion of OTA firmware implementation. Phases 0-3.2 code-complete; hardware tests pending for Phases 1, 2, 2.1, 3, 3.1, 3.2. Phase 4 (integration) not started.

nodes.label: Claude Project Instructions (CLAUDE.md)
nodes.rationale: Project context, constraints, and conventions for Claude Code. Defines MCU platform, build system, directory layout, peripheral allocation, FreeRTOS task map, modem HTTP(S) service, memory constraints, mutex rules, coding standards, and forbidden actions.

nodes.label: Agents Instructions (AGENTS.md)
nodes.rationale: Instructions for AI code-review-graph MCP tools. Directs agents to use graph tools before Grep/Glob/Read for exploring the codebase.

nodes.label: Gemini Instructions (GEMINI.md)
nodes.rationale: Same code-review-graph MCP tool instructions as AGENTS.md, targeted at Gemini AI agent.

nodes.label: Server Architecture Specification
nodes.rationale: Final architecture for the IoT data server: FastAPI + Nginx + PostgreSQL + TimescaleDB. Defines mTLS for devices, JWT for admins, binary ingest protocol, OTA pull model with 20-slot staged rollout, firmware image storage, and resolved design decisions Q-S1 through Q-S13.

nodes.label: Server Implementation Plan
nodes.rationale: Phased plan for building the server in html/. Phases 0-2 complete. Phases 3-10 pending. Target host: robin-gpu.cpe.ku.ac.th (Ubuntu, Debian 13, Python 3.13.5, PostgreSQL 17, TimescaleDB 2.27.0-dev).

nodes.label: Server Test Plan
nodes.rationale: Python black-box test harness in server_test/. Simulates real devices and admins against deployed server. Test series T0 (harness), T1 (ingest), T2 (OTA device), T3 (admin campaign), T4 (mTLS/Nginx), T5 (soak/load).

nodes.label: STM32L476RG MCU
nodes.rationale: Cortex-M4F, 1 MB Flash (dual-bank), 128 KB SRAM. Flash layout: 32 KB bootloader at 0x08000000, 480 KB application at 0x08008000, 512 KB Bank 2 reserved. SRAM1 96 KB for application, SRAM2 32 KB for OTA flags.

nodes.label: CY15B116QN FRAM (2 MB)
nodes.rationale: 2 MB SPI FRAM, byte-addressable, unlimited write endurance, no erase cycle. First 1 MB: DB ring buffer (0x000000-0x0FDFFF) + Config Sector (0x0FE000) + OtaControlBlock. Second 1 MB: OTA staging (0x100000-0x1FFFFF) with header, image data, download bitmap.

nodes.label: SIMCom A7670E LTE Modem
nodes.rationale: TLS 1.2 modem. Uses AT+HTTP* service only (no CCH/AT+CCH*). SSL context 0 shared by upload and download. Known issue: cert files must be PEM with -----BEGIN/-----END headers despite *_der.c filenames.

nodes.label: OtaControlBlock_t (shared/ota_control_block.h)
nodes.rationale: 64-byte packed struct at FRAM config sector offset +0x80. Fields: magic (0x0AC0FFEE), ota_pending, ota_tried (max 3 attempts), ota_confirmed, image_size, image_sha256 (32 bytes), fw_version, download_timestamp, block_crc32. Dual-copy for power-loss tolerance. Compiled into both application and bootloader via BOOTLOADER_BUILD ifdef.

nodes.label: FRAM Address Constants (shared/fram_addresses.h)
nodes.rationale: Single source of truth for all FRAM addresses. Also contains FLASH_APP_SIZE_MAX = 480*1024 (Phase 3.2). Compiled into both application and bootloader environments.

nodes.label: OTA State Machine
nodes.rationale: 8 states: IDLE → POLLING_VERSION → (W>0: wait/retry) → DOWNLOADING → DOWNLOAD_COMPLETE → VERIFIED → REBOOT_PENDING → CONFIRMING → IDLE. State persisted in OtaControlBlock_t in FRAM. Rollout gate: W.seconds from server. Rollback: ota_tried>=3 or IWDG timeout before ota_confirm_success().

nodes.label: Bootloader Design
nodes.rationale: Separate PlatformIO env at 0x08000000 (32 KB), no FreeRTOS. Reads OCB from FRAM, validates image_size <= FLASH_APP_SIZE_MAX, verifies SHA-256, programs Flash page-by-page with IWDG refresh, D-cache reset before each memcmp verify, I-cache reset after all pages written. SP sanity check before jump. RDP Level 1 + write protection on pages 0-15.

nodes.label: OtaManagerTask (Src/ota_manager_task.c)
nodes.rationale: FreeRTOS task (BelowNormal priority, 1024 words stack). Woken by xTaskNotify from ssluploadtask after each upload. Implements full OTA state machine. Builds device ID as region%1000:station%1000. Appends ?id=rrrsss to all OTA URLs. Parses V.#####:L.$$$$$$$:H.<sha256>:W.<seconds> response. Gates on W: W>0 returns to IDLE.

nodes.label: OTA Image Writer (Src/ota_image_writer.c)
nodes.rationale: Handles chunked FRAM write + download bitmap. API: oiw_begin, oiw_write_chunk, oiw_chunk_received, oiw_finalize, oiw_resume_info. 1 KB bitmap at 0x17F000 supports resume after power loss.

nodes.label: A7670 SSL Downloader (lib/A7670/a7670_ssl_downloader.c)
nodes.rationale: Chunked GET via AT+HTTP* service. Static buffers: s_chunk_read_buf[516] + s_cmd_buf[224] = 740 bytes. Returns SSL_DL_ERR_CRC on CRC mismatch, SSL_DL_ERR_HTTP on HTTP error (including 429). Rewritten for AT+HTTP* in Phase 2.1.

nodes.label: A7670 HTTPS Uploader (lib/A7670/a7670_https_uploader.c)
nodes.rationale: POST flow via AT+HTTP*: HTTPINIT -> HTTPPARA URL+CONTENT+SSLCFG -> HTTPDATA -> DOWNLOAD prompt -> binary body -> HTTPACTION=1 -> +HTTPACTION URC. 512 B fetch window (28 records/batch). Created in Phase 2.1 to replace deleted a7670_ssl_uploader.c.

nodes.label: CRC-32/MPEG-2 (shared/crc32.c)
nodes.rationale: Software CRC-32/MPEG-2 (poly 0x04C11DB7, init 0xFFFFFFFF, no reflection, no final XOR). 1 KB lookup table in Flash. HW CRC not used (locked to CRC-16/Modbus by modbus_init). Used for per-chunk transport integrity. Compiled into both application and bootloader.

nodes.label: SHA-256 (shared/sha256.c)
nodes.rationale: Standalone FIPS 180-4 SHA-256, no mbedTLS dependency. Accumulated during download per chunk. Bootloader re-verifies before Flash programming. Sole whole-image integrity check. Compiled into both application and bootloader.

nodes.label: WatchdogTask (Src/watchdog_task.c)
nodes.rationale: High priority FreeRTOS task (500 ms period, 256 words stack). Per-task heartbeat API; every task must call wdt_kick() within 500 ms. Refreshes IWDG. Fires IWDG if new app hangs before ota_confirm_success() within 60 s -> bootloader rollback.

nodes.label: SSL Upload Task (Src/ssluploadtask.c)
nodes.rationale: Noon/midnight HTTPS upload via A7670. Batches FRAM records, POSTs via AT+HTTP*. Sends xTaskNotify to OtaManagerTask after upload. MAX_RECORDS_PER_UPLOAD raised to 28 in Phase 2.1.

nodes.label: Boot Flash Driver (bootloader/src/boot_flash.c)
nodes.rationale: Bootloader Flash programmer. Page erase + 64-bit writes + read-back memcmp verify for Bank1 pages 16-255. IWDG refresh per page. D-cache reset before each memcmp. I-cache reset after all pages written. page_buf declared as static uint64_t for 8-byte alignment.

nodes.label: Boot FRAM Driver (bootloader/src/boot_fram.c)
nodes.rationale: Polling SPI1 FRAM read for bootloader. No DMA, no interrupts, no FreeRTOS. WREN + READ + WRITE opcodes.

nodes.label: OTA Version Check Protocol
nodes.rationale: Plain-text protocol: V.#####:L.$$$$$$$:H.<sha256hex>:W.<seconds> in HTML body. Device scans for regex pattern. Missing W. treated as W.0 (backward compat). UPDATE_PATH = /api/v1/weather (Option B). Device identity: ?id=rrrsss where r=region%1000, s=station%1000.

nodes.label: OTA Chunk Download Protocol
nodes.rationale: GET <UPDATE_PATH>/get_firmware?offset=<byte_offset>&length=<bytes>&id=<rrrsss>. Response: <length> bytes + 4-byte little-endian CRC-32/MPEG-2 trailer. 429 on out-of-slot. Retry up to 3x per chunk. Resume via FRAM download bitmap.

nodes.label: FastAPI Application (html/app/)
nodes.rationale: FastAPI app in html/app/. Routers: weather.py (POST /api/v1/weather/upload), ota.py (GET /api/v1/weather/, GET /api/v1/weather/get_firmware), admin.py (/admin/*). DB via asyncpg pool. Auth: mtls.py (X-SSL-Client-Verify header) + jwt.py (bcrypt+HS256).

nodes.label: Nginx mTLS Termination (html/nginx/iot_server.conf)
nodes.rationale: Two server{} blocks on port 443 (SNI-selected). Device vhost (api.iot.example.com): private CA, ssl_verify_client on, single /api/v1/weather/ location. Admin vhost (admin.iot.example.com): Let's Encrypt, ssl_verify_client off. Rate limit keyed on $arg_id (10r/s, burst 20).

nodes.label: Database Schema (PostgreSQL + TimescaleDB)
nodes.rationale: Tables: devices (region_id, station_id UNIQUE), weather_records (TimescaleDB hypertable, compressed after 7 days), ingest_log (idempotency key), ota_campaigns (version, firmware_sha256, firmware_size, rollout_start, slot_len_sec, target_cohort_ids, status, success_rate), download_completions (campaign_id, device_id, chunk_index - PRIMARY KEY for idempotency), admin_users. PostgreSQL 17 + TimescaleDB 2.27.0-dev.

nodes.label: OTA Staged Rollout Logic
nodes.rationale: 20-slot schedule over 10 days. Slot assignment: dev_slot = zlib.crc32(device_id.encode('ascii')) % num_slots. compute_wait() is pure function - stateless per request, monotone in time. Egress: ~50 devices/slot, ~90 KB/s peak, ~512 MB total over 10 days. Uses Python zlib.crc32 (IEEE 802.3, reflected) - different from firmware CRC-32/MPEG-2.

nodes.label: Firmware Image Storage
nodes.rationale: Stored under html/firmware/ as v{version}.bin. Atomic write (tmp + rename). Version auto-assigned as MAX+1. Size ceiling: 480 KB (HTTP 413 if exceeded). Retention: FIRMWARE_KEEP_N=3 terminal campaigns kept; non-terminal never deleted. SHA-256 recomputed on campaign start for integrity check.

nodes.label: Binary Sensor Ingest Protocol
nodes.rationale: POST /api/v1/weather/upload. Binary packed struct: 5-byte header (uint16 region_id, uint16 station_id, uint8 chunk_count) + 18-byte chunks (Weather_Data_Packed_t). Fixed-point conversion: value/128.0 (S9.7 format, FIXEDPT_FBITS=7). Y2K epoch conversion. Idempotency on (region_id, station_id, first_sample_timestamp).

nodes.label: mTLS Device Authentication
nodes.rationale: Entire fleet shares one client certificate - no per-device CN. Device identity from application payload (region_id/station_id) or ?id=rrrsss query param only. Nginx validates client cert against private CA + CRL, forwards X-SSL-Client-Verify header. FastAPI checks this header.

nodes.label: Server Test Harness (server_test/)
nodes.rationale: Python httpx-based black-box test harness. MockDevice class simulates real TLS client with shared fleet cert. AdminClient for JWT-authenticated admin operations. lib/crc32.py mirrors shared/crc32.c. lib/fixedpt.py mirrors fixedptc.h. lib/packed.py mirrors Weather_Data_Packed_t layout.

nodes.label: FreeRTOS Task Architecture
nodes.rationale: Tasks: DataCollectionTask (Normal/512w), UploadTask (BelowNormal/1024w), OtaManagerTask (BelowNormal/1024w, notified by UploadTask), ModemTask (AboveNormal/768w), WatchdogTask (High/256w). Total stack ~14.3 KB. Inter-task: xTaskNotify UploadTask->OtaManagerTask; xQueueSend to ModemTask; g_fram_spi_mutex for FRAM access.

nodes.label: Mutex Strategy
nodes.rationale: Two mutexes: g_fram_spi_mutex (all SPI1/FRAM, ALWAYS FIRST), g_ota_state_mutex (OtaControlBlock_t RMW, always second). Violating acquisition order causes deadlock.

nodes.label: Internal Flash Layout
nodes.rationale: 0x08000000: Bootloader 32 KB (pages 0-15, Bank 1, RDP1+WRP). 0x08008000: Application 480 KB (pages 16-255, Bank 1). 0x08080000: Bank 2 512 KB reserved for future dual-bank atomic swap. FLASH_APP_SIZE_MAX = 480*1024 enforced by both device firmware and server upload.

nodes.label: Flash Cache Management (§9.4)
nodes.rationale: STM32L476 ART Accelerator has ICACHE and DCACHE (not ARM Cortex-M7 SCB caches). Both enabled by default. Failure modes: stale D-cache during read-back verify; stale I-cache after jump. Required: disable/reset/enable DCACHE before each memcmp; disable/reset/enable ICACHE after all pages written.

nodes.label: ota_confirm_success()
nodes.rationale: Called by new app within 60 seconds of boot to confirm successful OTA. Sets ota_confirmed=1, ota_pending=0 in OCB. If not called, IWDG fires and bootloader rolls back to previous firmware.

nodes.label: Phase 0: Prerequisite Hardening
nodes.rationale: COMPLETE 2026-04-16. PlatformIO bootloader env, FW_VERSION flag, g_fram_spi_mutex on all FRAM accesses, snapshot-copy pattern, ring-buffer bug fixes, watchdog_task, shared/fram_addresses.h, RAM 20%/Flash 9%.

nodes.label: Phase 1: Bootloader
nodes.rationale: CODE COMPLETE 2026-04-16, hardware tests pending. Bootloader env, OCB dual-copy, boot_fram, boot_flash with cache management, rollback on ota_tried>=3, SP sanity check. Both envs build: bootloader 5.7 KB Flash / 2.8 KB RAM.

nodes.label: Phase 2: Download Infrastructure
nodes.rationale: CODE COMPLETE 2026-04-17, hardware tests pending. crc32.c, a7670_ssl_downloader.c (AT+HTTP*), ota_image_writer.c, sha256 moved to shared/.

nodes.label: Phase 2.1: Upload Migration to HTTPS
nodes.rationale: COMPLETE 2026-04-18. CCH eliminated. a7670_https_uploader.c created, a7670_ssl_uploader.c deleted. MAX_RECORDS_PER_UPLOAD=28 (up from 12). App 92 KB Flash (18%), 24.2 KB RAM (25%).

nodes.label: Phase 3: OTA Manager Task
nodes.rationale: CODE COMPLETE 2026-04-19, hardware tests pending. Full 8-state machine, version response parser, server_version_is_newer(), integrated into MX_FREERTOS_Init(), ota_confirm_success(). App 22.7% RAM / 9.3% Flash.

nodes.label: Phase 3.1: Rollout Gate + Device Identity
nodes.rationale: CODE COMPLETE, verified 2026-04-21. parse_version_response() extracts optional W.<seconds>. URL builder appends ?id=rrrsss. HTTP 429 handled as retryable SSL_DL_ERR_HTTP. Backward compat: missing W. -> W.0. Build unchanged: 22.7% RAM / 9.3% Flash.

nodes.label: Phase 3.2: Image Size Guard
nodes.rationale: CODE COMPLETE, verified 2026-04-26. FLASH_APP_SIZE_MAX=480*1024 added to fram_addresses.h. Device rejects L.>480 KB in POLLING_VERSION. Bootloader guards image_size before SHA-256 verify. 6/6 unit tests pass. Hardware tests pending.

nodes.label: Server Phase 0: Host Provisioning
nodes.rationale: COMPLETE. Debian 13, Python 3.13.5, PostgreSQL 17, TimescaleDB 2.27.0-dev, Nginx, UFW. Runtime dirs created. TimescaleDB extension initialized in weather database.

nodes.label: Server Phase 1: Application Skeleton
nodes.rationale: COMPLETE 2026-04-26. FastAPI skeleton with /health endpoint, Pydantic config, systemd service, deployed to robin-gpu.cpe.ku.ac.th. Service active. Initial deploy via scp; git-pull deferred to Phase 10.

nodes.label: Server Phase 2: Database Schema
nodes.rationale: COMPLETE 2026-04-26. All 6 tables + schema_migrations created. weather_records hypertable confirmed. asyncpg pool initialized. DB DSN uses Unix socket for peer auth.

nodes.label: Risk Register
nodes.rationale: R-1 through R-15 mostly RESOLVED. Only R-12 remains open: cert arrays compiled with *_der.c names but must be PEM format. Risk: silent cert corruption on modem FS. Fix: verify -----BEGIN header in each cert array.

nodes.label: Design Decisions (Q-1 through Q-8)
nodes.rationale: All resolved: Q-1 copy-in-place, Q-2 CRC-32+SHA-256, Q-3 background download, Q-4 60s confirm window, Q-5 private CA mTLS, Q-6 plain-text protocol, Q-7 standalone sha256 (no mbedTLS), Q-8 twice daily check.

nodes.label: Server Design Decisions (Q-S1 through Q-S13)
nodes.rationale: All resolved: Q-S1 URL under /api/v1/weather/, Q-S2 firmware W./id= params, Q-S3 rate limit by $arg_id, Q-S4 keep last N terminal firmware, Q-S5 success_rate at status-change, Q-S6 ceiling division, Q-S7 region/station crop %1000, Q-S8 cancelled not rolled_back, Q-S9 separate SNI listeners, Q-S10 NULL=entire fleet, Q-S11 absolute FIRMWARE_DIR, Q-S12 PG17+TSDB from source, Q-S13 download_completions table.
